headline: Vinson & Elkins: Two Good to Be True? The SEC Proposes Optional Semiannual Reporting
summary: By Robert L. Kimball, Katherine Terrell Frank, Alex Bahn, Jon Solorzano, Alexandra M. Lewis, Chloe Schmergel, Josh Rutenberg, Randy Thomas, and Matt Turk On May 5, 2026, the SEC proposed to provide public companies the option of filing interim reports semiannually on new Form 10-S instead of quarterly on Form 10-Q. The proposal would amend Rules 13a-13 […] The post Vinson & Elkins: Two Good to Be True? The SEC Proposes Optional Semiannual Reporting appeared first on CorpGov.

headline: S&P Global Extends Cement Pricing Data As Carbon Rules Tighten
summary: S&P Global Energy has launched 16 new Platts price assessments for cement, clinker, ground granulated blast furnace slag, and related freight. The new benchmarks cover key global regions and are designed to improve transparency around costs and trade flows. The launch comes as construction materials face higher environmental scrutiny and new frameworks such as the EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism. S&P Global (NYSE:SPGI), trading at $428.68, is expanding its data reach in construction...

headline: A Look At S&P Global (SPGI) Valuation As Mobility Separation Moves Ahead With Form 10 Filing
summary: S&P Global (SPGI) has filed a Form 10 with the SEC to separate its Mobility division into a new public company, a structural shift that could reshape how investors think about the stock. See our latest analysis for S&P Global. The Form 10 filing and recent first quarter earnings sit against a weaker share price backdrop, with a year-to-date share price return of a 16.38% decline and a 1-year total shareholder return of a 14.88% decline. However, the 3-year and 5-year total shareholder returns...

headline: Strong April payrolls data points to firmer Wall Street open: Dow Jones, S&P, Nasdaq, Futures
summary: U. S. stock futures traded higher ahead of Friday’s opening bell, suggesting markets could recover after weakness in the previous session as investors reacted positively to stronger-than-expected labour market data.

headline: S&P Global Announces Board of Directors for Mobility Global
summary: S&P Global Inc. (NYSE: SPGI) today announced the Board of Directors for Mobility Global Inc. ("Mobility Global") following its planned separation from S&P Global into an independent, public company by mid-2026.

raw.headline: S&P Global Announces Board of Directors for Mobility Global

headline: Scotiabank top scoring bank in North America for third year in a row, selected to the Dow Jones Best-in-Class Index
summary: Scotiabank announced today it secured the top S&P Global ESG Score amongst banks in North America, based on S&P's 2025 Corporate Sustainability Assessment (CSA). The Bank also maintained its eight-year track record of inclusion in the Dow Jones Best-in-Class Index North America.

headline: A Look At Wolverine World Wide (WWW) Valuation After Leadership Changes And Credit Rating Upgrade
summary: Wolverine World Wide (WWW) is back in focus after reshaping leadership in its Work Group and receiving a credit rating upgrade from S&P Global Ratings, putting governance and balance sheet quality in the spotlight for stock watchers. See our latest analysis for Wolverine World Wide.
